channel.title: Restaurator. International Journal for the Preservation of Library and Archival Material
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Restaurator. International Journal for the Preservation of Library and Archival Material

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Yeni Budi Rachman, Shuri Mariasih Gietty Tambunan, Turita Indah Setyani DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/res-2024-frontmatter4

item.title: Techniques for Filling Losses in Palm Leaf Manuscripts
item.description: Article by Yeni Budi Rachman, Shuri Mariasih Gietty Tambunan, Turita Indah Setyani DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/res-2024-0008

item.title: Study of Toned Photographs of the Late 19th and Early 20th Century Using Multispectral Imaging and SEM/EDS Analysis
item.description: Article by Yeni Budi Rachman, Shuri Mariasih Gietty Tambunan, Turita Indah Setyani DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/res-2024-0015

item.title: Arsenic Pigments in Libraries – Testing Methods, Contaminated Spaces, and Occupational Safety Measures
item.description: Article by Yeni Budi Rachman, Shuri Mariasih Gietty Tambunan, Turita Indah Setyani DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/res-2024-0009

item.title: Critical Paradigm Approach in Preservation and Conservation Studies: An Initial Note
item.description: Article by Yeni Budi Rachman, Shuri Mariasih Gietty Tambunan, Turita Indah Setyani DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/res-2024-0018
